posts.author: MMH (Maryam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would be amazing to be able to re-arrange the addition of subitems within the creation of an automation.

What are you trying to achieve

Re-arrange subitems within the creation of an automation, instead of deleting them and re-adding.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also wish that automation sequences can have a drag and drop for order of operations.

If your goal is to add subitems, but you don’t want to delete already created rows in the automation even though you want your subitems to be in a specific order, there is a band-aid solution.

Add an additional column, whether a number or status column. In the automations, change each subitem number/status column to the correct number. 1st is 1, 2nd is 2, etc.

Then, create a view in your board wherein you sorted your subitems by that number.

I hope this band-aid helps.
